title: cajanus suaveolens
intro: Cajanus suaveolens, also known as the cluster bean or sweet cajanus, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cajanus suaveolens include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as a decoction, made by boiling the leaves and roots in water, or as a powder, mixed with other herbs to create a medicinal tonic.
